prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: What My Sister Buried
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Divorce Gothic
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: career vs family guilt
Props: scarf with impossible timing, casserole dish, unopened letter

Cast:
- Mara Pike | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.22 | space=church basement described as donation overflow | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Gavin Hale | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=hospital administrator | threat_aura=0.61 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Brooke Bennett | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.64 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence; knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Claire Pike | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.57 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Luke Sutton | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=private school administrator | threat_aura=0.85 | space=old family office described as just storage | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Luke Dane | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.39 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Tess Pruitt | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Daniel Bell | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Gavin Hale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Mara Pike says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Gavin?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Mara. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Claire."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
